name: Submit Basic Mass offer successfully

steps.name: Given the Draft Basic Mass API is available
When I submit an offer using "SubmitBasicMassOffer.json"
Then the response status code should be 201
And the response should contain offerId
And the response should have offerCode "RLM backend use cases"
And the response status should be "LoadedToCampaign"

fullName: Basic Mass Offer: Submit Basic Mass offer successfully
